title: stelis chasme
intro: Stelis chasme, also known as the Antillia Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Caribbean and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Stelis chasme include the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis chasme include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
